report_name: Palo Alto Networks to Acquire Portkey, an AI Gateway Startup, to Secure Autonomous AI Agents

identities.name: Palo Alto Networks
identities.description: A cybersecurity company that announced its intent to acquire Portkey to integrate its AI Gateway technology into the Prisma AIRS (AI Runtime Security) platform.

identities.name: Portkey
identities.description: An AI Gateway startup being acquired by Palo Alto Networks. Its technology provides a centralized control plane to manage, monitor, and secure AI agent traffic.
